titleStmt.title: SII 34.172: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 172. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock outside the north prākāra wall of the Ratnāchalēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya, 13th year, Tulā, badi 13, Monday, Śravaṇa = A.D. 1264, January 28, Monday (taking the month as Kumbha for Tulā).

This records the resolution of a dispute between the temples of Tirumāṇikkamalai-uḍaiya-Nāyaṉār, etc. in Kuṟunagar-nāḍu a unit of Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu and the nagarattār of the town Śivapādaśēkhara-puram as regards the payment of taxes by the people residing respectively in the temple streets of some three temples and in the town. On hearing the dispute he deputed a chief officer (mudali) accompanied with another mudali of Perumāḷ Vīrapāṇḍya (perhaps the Prince) to enquire and settle the dispute. The two officers and the nāḍavar of Kuṟunagar-nāḍu, Mīkōṭṭu-nāḍu, and Ādaṉūr-nāḍu met at Kuḻittaṇḍalai and resolved that the occupants of the the temple streets, namely the Śivabrāhmaṇas, temple girls, kaikkōḷar, etc., should pay their taxes to the respective temples and the herding people living in the town but rearing the livestock of the temples should pay to the nagaram body. The occupants of the two sides should not migrate to the other side hereafter. A number of persons including several Cheṭṭis have attested the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya
tēvaṟkku yāṇṭu patiṉmūṉṟāvatu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattutriyōdaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamai
yum peṟṟa tiruvōṇattuṉāḷ Irāca gaṅbhīra vaḷanāṭṭu kuṟunakarnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭai
yaṉāyanā kōyil tāṉattōmum civapāta cēkarapurattu nakarattōmum Eṅkaḷil kaṭamai vivādattukku ci ku
Iṭṭa Iṭattu Itu perumāḷ Aṟintaruḷi vanta tirumukappaṭikku perumāḷ mutalikaḷil Uṭaiyār cētiyarāyarum
perumāḷ vīrapāṇṭiya tēvar mutalikaḷil Uṭaiyār vēṇāṭu Uṭaiyārum Ināṭṭu nāṭavarum mīkōṭṭu
nāṭṭu nāṭavarum Ātaṉūr ṉāṭṭu nāṭavarum Uṭpaṭa brahmatēcaṅ kuḻittaṇṭalaiyil kēṭṭu Icaivu tīṭṭu Iṭṭa I
caivutīṭṭuiṭṭapaṭikku Innāyaṉār tiruviḷaṅkōyil tirumaṭaviḷākaṅkaḷilum Uṭaiyār tiruvālīcuramuṭaiya nā
yaṉār maṭaviḷākamum Uṭaiyār śrīkayilāyamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattilum Irukkum Āṇṭār kaḷum śivaprā
hmaṇarum tEvaraṭiyārum kaikkOḷarum Uvaccarum maṟṟu ṟukkum ri puṉvari maṉaivari
Āḷvari māṭṭu vari Uḷḷuṭṭa kaṭamaikaḷum viniyōkaṅkaḷum Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiya nāyaṉār
kku Iṟukkavum Ināyaṉār tiruccurapi mēkkiṟa Iṭaiyar nakarattilē kuṭi Iruntu tirucurapi mēttu
muṉpilāṇṭukaḷ nakarattārkku Iṟukkum kaṭamai nakarattārkku Iṟukkavum nakarattār paṟṟil paṉṉiraṇ
ṭāvatu varaiyum kuṭi Iruntu kaṭamai Iṟukkumavarkaḷ tirumaṭaviḷākattu pukuta kaṭavarkaḷ Allaākavum
tirumaṭaviḷākattil kuṭi nakarattil pōkakaṭavakaḷ Alla Ākavum nakarakkaṇkāṇi piḷḷaikkaṭiyār Uṭa
muṉpilāṇṭiṉ paṭikaḷilē pūcaiceyvatākavum Ippaṭi Oḻiyakkaṭavōm Alla
Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Icaivutīṭṭu Iṭṭōm Ivaṉaivōm Ivai ṅka
piccaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vīrapāṇṭiya civayapāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu I Eḻuttu
nakarakaṅkāṇi piḷḷaikkaṭiyāṉ Eḻuttu tēva ṭāṉ Eḻuttu
kōyil kaṇakku māṇikkanāyaka piriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vayirāta rāyaṉ Eḻuttu
paṭṭaṇa cuvāmi Eḻuttu mēṉāṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu kō muttu cōḻapirāṉ ceṭṭi Eḻuttu
vīrapāṇṭiya ceṭṭi Eḻuttu kulacēkaraceṭṭi Eḻuttu vikkiramapāṇṭiya ceṭṭi Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇ
ṭiya cakkaravatti Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭi ceṭṭi Eḻuttu tiruñāṉacampantac cakkaravatti Eḻuttu Uyyak
koṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu tirukkaḷaṟṟupaṭinampi Eḻuttu Aḻakiyacōḻaceṭṭi ṟ kōyil
nampi Eḻuttu Aṉakaikōṉ Eḻuttu nakarakaṇakku māṇikkaṉāyaka piriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ
cirivikkirama cōḻa brahmarāyaṉ Eḻuttu tirumaṅkainampi Eḻuttu Aḻakiyacōḻa brahmarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
vallaṅkiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu muṭikoṇṭaceṭṭi Eḻuttu kattivāyaṉ Eḻuttu jayataraviḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Arintavan viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu camaiyacēṉāpati Eḻuttu kulacēkaraceṭṭi Eḻuttu
teṉṉavaṉ brahmarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Irācapaṇṭita brahmarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
nāṭṭukaṇakku marutūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvālicuramuṭaiya
kōṭṭur nāṭṭu piriyaṉ Eḻuttuḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
